/Users/ombhardwaj/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/Users/ombhardwaj/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/28.0.12674087/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments   -Wl,--gc-sections  -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/minigzip.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/minigzip.dir/minigzip.c.o -o minigzip  ../libz.so -latomic -lm
